creator: alfredo@freebsd.org
text:
Sergey, actuallty on powerpc the .iso is used on both DVD and USB/FireWire disk, there's no "memstick" style, you can "dd" the image directly on the USB drive/stick.

There's a list of hardware that has been tested on [1] and some tips on how to boot on older hardware on [2]. Please let us know if it works for you.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/ppc/
[2] https://wiki.freebsd.org/powerpc
